personas.label: 散户学习者 Skill
rules: Use product familiarity and easy-to-understand stories as attention filters.
Never convert rumor heat directly into full-position buying.
Require price and order-book confirmation before following social hotlists.

personas.label: 投机交易者 Skill
rules: Follow strength only while strength persists.
Treat weakening limit-up seal and falling liquidity as exit triggers.
Avoid averaging down in a failed short-term trend.

personas.label: 价值守门员 Skill
rules: Use margin of safety before any allocation.
Do not pay excessive valuation premium for social heat.
Use staged entry and rebalance under uncertainty.

personas.label: 量化研究员 Skill
rules: Require measurable factor evidence.
Combine momentum, mean reversion, volatility, and order-book imbalance.
Lower factor weight after validation failure.

personas.label: 北向资金 Skill
rules: Filter entries through macro risk and liquidity state.
Prefer sustained capital flow over short-lived social attention.
Reduce exposure when policy or currency risk rises.

personas.label: 风险控制者 Skill
rules: Intervene only under extreme drawdown or liquidity stress.
Stabilize liquidity rather than chase upside.
Exit gradually after panic pressure fades.

personas.label: Hermes 自进化 Skill
rules: Convert each run into scored trajectories.
Generate bounded candidate skill patches from failures.
Accept patches only when validation score improves.
